title: Coin, Vending, and Amusement Machine Servicers and Repairers
description: Install, service, adjust, or repair coin, vending, or amusement machines including video games, juke boxes, pinball machines, or slot machines.

tasks.text: Fill machines with products, ingredients, money, and other supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect machines and meters to determine causes of malfunctions and fix minor problems such as jammed bills or stuck products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Test machines to determine proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace malfunctioning parts, such as worn magnetic heads on automatic teller machine (ATM) card readers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records of machine maintenance and repair.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order parts needed for machine repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust and repair coin, vending, or amusement machines and meters and replace defective mechanical and electrical parts, using hand tools, soldering irons, and diagrams.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record transaction information on forms or logs, and notify designated personnel of discrepancies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records of merchandise distributed and money collected.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Collect coins and bills from machines, prepare invoices, and settle accounts with concessionaires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make service calls to maintain and repair machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust machine pressure gauges and thermostats.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble and assemble machines, according to specifications and using hand and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact other repair personnel or make arrangements for the removal of machines in cases where major repairs are required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refer to manuals and wiring diagrams to gather information needed to repair machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install machines, making the necessary water and electrical connections in compliance with codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
